positive: A vibrant, stylized mandala-style illustration centered on a grouping of three minimalist celestial bodies: a crescent moon, a stylized star constellation, and a rising sun. The design should use thick, clean, single-line contour art with a modern, geometric, yet flowing aesthetic. Incorporate surrounding decorative elements like stylized swirling galaxies, crescent leaves, and abstract floral motifs. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, perfectly balanced, and immediately recognizable as a cohesive graphic print. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, cream, and luminous gold accents. Vector art quality, seamless repeat capability, highly detailed, isolated on a solid background.
negative: photorealistic, grunge, texture, gradient, blur, noise, dirty, watermarks, text, logos, trademarks, celebrity, poorly drawn, low resolution, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly
